settings.title: Find Your Perfect Ride for Any Journey
settings.subtitle: Premium vehicles, unbeatable rates, and seamless booking — wherever your destination takes you.

settings.label: Why DriveEase
settings.heading:
Everything You Need,
Nothing You Don't

items.title: Free Cancellation
items.description: Plans change. Cancel up to 24 hours before pick-up at no cost, no questions asked.

items.title: 24/7 Support
items.description: Our team is available around the clock via phone, chat, or email whenever you need us.

items.title: GPS Included
items.description: Every vehicle comes equipped with a built-in GPS navigation system at no extra charge.

items.title: Full Insurance
items.description: Comprehensive insurance coverage included with every rental — drive with complete peace of mind.

steps.title: Search
steps.description: Enter your pick-up location, dates, and preferred vehicle class to browse availability.

steps.title: Book
steps.description: Select your car, add any extras, and confirm your booking in under two minutes.

steps.title: Drive
steps.description: Pick up the keys at your chosen branch and hit the road — it's that simple.

testimonials.quote: Booking was seamless and the car was in perfect condition. Pick-up at the airport branch took less than five minutes. Will definitely use again on my next trip.
testimonials.name: A. Johnson

testimonials.quote: We rented an SUV for a family road trip. Spacious, clean, and the GPS saved us countless times. The free cancellation policy gave us peace of mind.
testimonials.name: M. Fernandez

testimonials.quote: Great selection of vehicles and very transparent pricing. The 24/7 support team helped me sort out a minor issue within minutes. Highly recommend.
testimonials.name: S. Nakamura

settings.heading: Ready to Hit the Road?
settings.description: Browse our fleet of premium vehicles and book your perfect ride in under two minutes.
